purpose: F4 (fit-engine-finish-punchlist): acceptance oracle for the first-class run_qpwave entry — the standalone qpWave rank-sufficiency sweep with NO target argument (left[0] is the reference row). Validates run_qpwave's no-target-prepend / left[0]-is-reference semantic on BOTH backends (CpuBackend ORACLE + production CudaBackend, f2 RESIDENT) vs admixtools::qpwave(boot=FALSE). REAL AADR; REUSES the golden_fit0 9-pop f2 (fixtures/f2_fit0_9pop.bin) arranged as qpWave left/right splits — NO synthetic data, NO new fixture.

reproduction.canonical_invocation: qpwave(f2_dir, left=left, right=right, boot=FALSE, fudge=1e-4, cpp=TRUE) with set.seed(42); the f2 DIRECTORY-PATH form (the canonical bit-exact read, same caveat as golden_fit0.json). qpwave() takes NO target argument (admixtools qpwave reference): left[0] is the reference row.
reproduction.source_correction: REGENERATED from the convertf-converted PACKEDANCESTRYMAP (v66 TGENO -> PA). admixtools 2.0.10 does NOT support the raw v66 TGENO and silently misread it, producing the prior CORRUPT values (M1 chisq [4.635,31.97], M2 chisq 26.47). AT2 qpwave on the convertf-PA gives the values below. NOTE: the directory-path rankdrop here is what AT2 qpwave reports on the f2 dir; the committed binary fixture f2_fit0_9pop.bin is a read_f2 f2-OBJECT tensor that yields slightly different chisq (M1 rank0 1474.03, M2 1401.57) by the documented read-arg caveat — those f2-object-path values are what test_qpwave_parity.cu reproduces (TIGHT 1e-6) and are recorded in its constants.
reproduction.fixture_reuse: fixtures/f2_fit0_9pop.bin (the SAME REAL 9-pop f2 tensor golden_fit0/test_qpadm_domain use; pop index 0=England_BellBeaker 1=Czechia_EBA_CordedWare 2=Turkey_N 3=Mbuti 4=Israel_Natufian 5=Iran_GanjDareh_N 6=Han 7=Papuan 8=Karitiana).

metadata.source_geno_format: PACKEDANCESTRYMAP (convertf v8621 from the raw v66 TGENO)

M1_3left_rank1.description: 3-left qpWave: left[0]=England_BellBeaker is the reference, then CordedWare, Turkey_N (the qpadm target + 2 sources, now ALL left rows). Validates that run_qpwave's no-target path produces the SAME f4 matrix as qpadm's internal left=c(target,sources). est_rank=1 (the 3 left pops need 1 admixture wave; rank-1 model NOT rejected at alpha=0.05).

M2_2left_clade_rank0.description: 2-left qpWave CLADE test: left[0]=Czechia_EBA_CordedWare is the reference, then Turkey_N — the canonical qpWave question (are CordedWare and Turkey_N a clade vs the 6 rights?). The clade is REJECTED (p<<0.05) ⇒ est_rank=0 (all candidate ranks rejected ⇒ f4rank = rmax = 0). The ONLY candidate rank is r=0 ⇒ a single-row rankdrop (qpWave's distinguishing single-difference-row sweep). CORRECTED (convertf-PA; the corrupt TGENO golden was chisq 26.47). Directory-path chisq below; the f2-object fixture yields chisq 1401.57 (read-arg caveat) = test_qpwave_parity.cu's gated value.
